expectations.text: The decision resolves default `progress_file` to `dirname(prd_file) + "/progress.txt"` or the fixture `default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt` path.
expectations.evidence:
First write must go to the sibling path `dirname(prd_file)/progress.txt` for `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/default-progress-path-fixture/prd.json`, so create or append to `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt` there.

Forbidden fallback families: session-state paths, scratchpads, temp/session artifacts, home-artifact paths, `~/.copilot/...`, and any default progress path outside `dirname(prd_file)` unless the user supplied an explicit `progress_file`.

expectations.text: The decision says the sibling path should be created on first append if it does not exist yet.
